name: Janus International Group, Inc.
description: Janus International Group, Inc. is a leading global manufacturer and supplier of turn-key self-storage, commercial, and industrial building solutions. The company specializes in providing roll-up and swing doors, hallway systems, and re-locatable storage units, alongside advanced security technology and facility automation tools. Founded in 2002 and headquartered in Temple, Georgia, Janus International serves a diverse range of clients by offering comprehensive building products and innovative technology solutions designed to enhance the efficiency and security of storage and commercial facilities worldwide.
